title: psoralea lucens
intro: Psoralea lucens, also known as Lucens or Psoralia, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Psoralea lucens include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to improve skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis, as well as its ability to enhance fertility and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Psoralea lucens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to stimulate the body's natural healing processes.
